blockingIssues.description: scan_all_skills_impl stores installed_path as SKILL.md instead of the platform entry directory, so installation metadata is incorrect for scanned records.
scan_all_skills_impl never removes stale skills or skill_installations during rescan, so database-backed skill queries can return entries that no longer exist on disk.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update scrutiny validation/reviewer procedure so Task-spawned reviewers can run in a read-only or auto-approved mode; the current reviewer droid attempts Execute and exits before writing a report in this environment.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current scrutiny-validator session 681a56e2-aa1d-4076-a6c5-7fd8a7338ba5 shows five Task launches failing with "insufficient permission to proceed" before any review file was produced.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require handoffs (or feature completion rules) to record the full commit range for a feature, not only the last commitId, so scrutiny reviewers can inspect the right diff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: tauri-project-scaffold handoff records commitId 93e7b3a, but the scaffold feature actually spans f690ae5, af64eb9, and 93e7b3a, making single-commit review incomplete.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update tauri-rust-worker guidance to reference tempfile/TempDir instead of the deprecated tempdir crate.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: rust-scanner-and-parser handoff skillFeedback explicitly notes the skill docs still mention tempdir while the implementation correctly used tempfile.
